entries.note: V63-C reuses the shipped V63-A/V63-B remote lineage by default.
V63-C introduces one advisory remote hardening register only.
Committed lane artifacts outrank narrative interpretation or review prose for V63-C evidence basis.
V63-C replayability remains anchored by one explicit frozen policy ref.
Optional upstream response/control basis must stay posture-consistent or fail closed.
Candidate outcomes remain advisory-only, non-entitling, non-escalating, and later-lock bound.
The selected remote hardening path remains path-level and non-generalizing by default.
